summary: Checkout and fulfillment pipeline fixes verified. All 4 backend fixes working correctly: (1) Stripe checkout email binding, (2) Cart product identity with normalized IDs, (3) Account linking at checkout with JWT user_id extraction, (4) Webhook user mapping using stored user_id.
critical_code_review_comments: payment_routes.py lines 1273-1289: JWT user extraction correctly decodes Authorization Bearer token and looks up user in MongoDB
payment_routes.py line 1292: resolved_email correctly falls back to logged_in_user_email when customer_email not provided
payment_routes.py line 1411: customer_email passed to stripe.checkout.Session.create() via session_kwargs
payment_routes.py lines 1429-1438: Items stored with both product_id (raw) and normalized_product_id (via normalize_product_id function)
payment_routes.py lines 1458-1459: user_id and claimed_by_user_id both set to logged_in_user_id for authenticated checkouts
payment_routes.py lines 1782-1783: Webhook user_id resolution uses transaction.user_id or claimed_by_user_id, never falls back to session_id
context_for_next_testing_agent: Checkout and fulfillment pipeline fully tested. Key verified behaviors: (1) Guest checkout stores customer_email, user_id=null. (2) Authenticated checkout extracts user_id from JWT and stores in transaction with claimed_by_user_id. (3) Items stored with normalized_product_id field for reliable fulfillment. (4) Stripe session created with customer_email parameter. (5) Webhook uses stored user_id, never falls back to session_id. MongoDB verification script at /app/backend/tests/verify_checkout_fixes_mongodb.py can be reused for regression testing.

stripe_checkout_email_binding.details: POST /api/payments/checkout/cart with customer_email creates Stripe session with customer_email parameter

jwt_user_extraction.details: Authorization Bearer token decoded, user_id extracted from JWT payload

user_id_and_claimed_by_stored.details: Both user_id and claimed_by_user_id stored in payment_transactions for authenticated checkouts

normalized_product_id_stored.details: Items stored with both product_id and normalized_product_id fields

guest_checkout_works.details: Guest checkout (no auth token) works - user_id is null, customer_email is stored

email_fallback_to_logged_in_user.details: Without customer_email, uses logged-in user's email as fallback

multi_item_checkout.details: Multi-item cart checkout creates single Stripe session with correct total

coupon_discount_applied.details: Percentage discount coupons correctly reduce checkout amount

authenticated_checkout_transaction.customer_email: Falls back to logged-in user email
authenticated_checkout_transaction.user_id: Extracted from JWT and stored (e.g., user_4ecefa505010)

mocked_apis.none: Stripe is live mode - real sessions created (not completed)
